description: In the Scott McMichael 1:1 prep sheet, speculated about whether Scott was attending the One Texas SKO ('Does he want to attend or receive a debrief?') instead of checking the actual calendar invite attendees. Scott is explicitly listed on all four SKO invites: Dallas session, Dallas dinner, Houston session, Houston dinner.
correction: Check calendar invite attendee lists before making statements or asking speculative questions about attendance. The data was one search away.
systemic_fix: For any meeting prep involving a shared event, always pull the event invite and check the attendee list. Never speculate about attendance when the data is available.
